/opt/homebrew/opt/llvm/bin/clang++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/run_cholesky.dir/run_cholesky.cpp.o -o run_cholesky  ../performance_tests/libcoursework_perf_support.a ../src/libmphil_dis_cholesky.a /opt/homebrew/Cellar/llvm/22.1.1/lib/libomp.dylib -framework Accelerate -lm -ldl
